underlying_goal: Get nsdlp building and running locally after a develop merge broke the build, then validate the Gen3 rule engine eviction code changes through tests and commit them
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly tried to start nsdlp with the wrong flag syntax (--cfg vs -c) and assumed it was running when it had exited, requiring multiple user interruptions and corrections.
brief_summary: User wanted to fix a broken nsdlp build, validate rule engine eviction changes via tests, and commit; Claude debugged the build, ran the test suites successfully, applied grill fixes, and committed/pushed the code.
